# Doppler VPN

> Fast, private VPN with VLESS-Reality encryption. No logs, no email required, bypasses censorship in restrictive networks. Native apps for iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows. Pay with card, Apple Pay, or cryptocurrency.

Doppler VPN runs the VLESS-Reality protocol over Xray-core. It is engineered specifically for users in heavily censored networks (Iran, China, Russia, UAE, Turkey) where mainstream VPN protocols (OpenVPN, WireGuard, IKEv2) are detected and blocked. The website at https://www.dopplervpn.org is multilingual (44 locales for the marketing site, 21 for the blog).

## Product

- [Homepage](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en): Product overview, pricing, platforms, FAQ.
- [Downloads](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/downloads): App Store, Google Play, macOS .dmg, Windows .exe, Telegram bot.
- [Account](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/account): Manage subscription, devices, and account recovery.
- [Support](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/support): FAQ, troubleshooting, contact channels.
- [About](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/about): Company, mission, jurisdiction.

## Geographic landing pages (high-censorship regions)

- [VPN for China](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-china): Great Firewall bypass, VLESS-Reality protocol, WeChat/Bilibili/Weibo access workarounds.
- [VPN for Iran](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-iran): Internet blackout resistance, no-registration sign-up, crypto payment.
- [VPN for Russia](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-russia): Roskomnadzor blocklist bypass, Instagram, Facebook, blocked news sites.
- [VPN for Turkey](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-turkey): X (Twitter), Wikipedia, news outlet access during state-imposed blocks.
- [VPN for UAE](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-uae): VoIP and messaging apps (WhatsApp calls, Telegram calls, FaceTime).

## Use-case landing pages

- [Bypass internet censorship](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/bypass-censorship): Deep-dive on detection methods (DPI, SNI inspection, active probing) and defense (Reality, Vision flow control).
- [VLESS-Reality VPN](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vless-vpn): Protocol explainer, comparison to WireGuard / OpenVPN / Shadowsocks.
- [VLESS-Reality on Android](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vless-vpn-android): Android-specific VLESS client and setup.
- [No-registration VPN](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/no-registration-vpn): Anonymous sign-up via account ID (VPN-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX) — no email, no phone.
- [Pay with crypto](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/pay-with-crypto): Accepted coins, payment flow, privacy benefits.
- [VPN for Instagram in Russia](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-instagram-russia)
- [VPN for public Wi-Fi (iPhone)](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-public-wifi-iphone)
- [VPN for Telegram calls in UAE](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-telegram-calls-uae)
- [VPN for WhatsApp calls in UAE](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-whatsapp-calls-uae)
- [VPN for TikTok ban](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-tiktok-ban)
- [VPN for travelers to China](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-travelers-china)

## Platform landing pages

- [VPN for iOS](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-ios): iPhone and iPad client, on-demand rules.
- [VPN for Android](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-android): Android client with VLESS-Reality and Xray.
- [VPN for macOS](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-macos): macOS client, Network Extension, Apple Silicon native.
- [VPN for Windows](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/vpn-for-windows): Windows 10/11 client, WireGuard tunnel.

## Blog (technical and policy commentary)

- [Blog index](https://www.dopplervpn.org/en/blog): Privacy research, jurisdiction analysis, protocol comparisons, censorship news. Updated regularly; available in 21 languages.
